chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Distant Kindred (dhawi Al-arham) Alongside Freed Slaves (mawali)

text: 5654 - وَ قَدْ رَوَى جَابِرٌ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ كَانَ يُعْطِي أُولِي اَلْأَرْحَامِ دُونَ اَلْمَوَالِي".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5654 - Jabir narrated from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that:
"Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) used to give inheritance to the blood relatives over the freed slaves."
